login.subtitle: Use the account created by your Admin — your registered username or phone number.
login.identifierPlaceholder: Enter your username or phone number
login.footerHelp: Accounts are created by an admin. Contact your <0>Admin</0> if you have any issues.
login.invalidCredentials: Incorrect username / phone number or password

hero.heading: Surabaya's green open spaces, monitored.
hero.body: Track field workers, manage maintenance tasks, and evaluate performance — all in one place.

validation.identifierMax: Username / phone number must be at most 50 characters
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.heading: Create a new password
changePassword.description: Your password was just reset by an admin. For security, please create a new password before continuing.
changePassword.validationNewPasswordMin: New password must be at least 8 characters
